Hi Lurline Kub,
Innovation is key to staying relevant in business.
Encourage your team to think creatively and share ideas.
Consider setting aside time for brainstorming sessions.
Stay open to new technologies that can improve your processes.
Investing in innovation can lead to new products and services.
Don't be afraid to take calculated risks.
Best regards,
Kory IconfoundWMG

Robert Pratt,
I got your info from the YPO Construction Network directory. I am a lifelong specialty contractor and fellow YPOer (Rocky Mountains). I took a small family business and built a national environmental services platform (EIS Holdings). We sold the business in 2021, and I left the CEO role in early 2024. Since that time, I launched Iconic Founders Group, which supports blue-collar industry founders through the transaction/exit process…

Hi Finley Flores,
Customer feedback is invaluable for improving your services.
Encourage your clients to share their thoughts and experiences.
Use surveys or direct conversations to gather insights.
Analyze this feedback to identify areas for improvement.
Implementing changes based on customer input can enhance satisfaction.
Happy customers are more likely to return and refer others.
Best regards,
Kory IconfoundWMG

Hi Nancy Sanchez,
I wanted to share some insights on effective communication in the workplace.
Encouraging open dialogue can foster a positive culture.
Consider implementing regular feedback sessions to address concerns.
This can help build trust and improve team dynamics.
Additionally, using clear and concise language can prevent misunderstandings.
I hope you find these tips helpful for your team.

Best regards Kory IconfoundWMG

Hi Sallie Schmidt,
I wanted to share some thoughts on team motivation.
Recognizing your team's efforts can boost morale and productivity.
Consider implementing a rewards program to celebrate achievements.
Encouraging a positive work environment can lead to better collaboration.
Regular team-building activities can strengthen relationships among team members.
Let me know if you find these ideas useful.

Best regards Kory IconfoundWMG
